message:
fix: repair 3 test regressions + 1 production bug from concurrent changes

- proptest_agent_correlator: slug comparison now uses AgentProvider
  canonical_name instead of AgentType Display (ClaudeCode→"claude"
  not "claude_code") after unified AgentProvider migration
- proptest_recorder_storage: FrankenSqlite serde expects "frankensqlite"
  not "franken_sqlite" after rename attribute change
- proptest_chunking: glue limit formula accounts for pass-2 merging
  multiple tiny trailing chunks, not just pairs
- entropy_accounting: update_block decay loop changed from `if` to
  `while` so large blocks decay correctly (fill_ratio stays ≤ ~2.0)
- Close ft-1u90p.7 (Validation Program) — all 16 children completed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
